Coding.description: A reference to a code in a terminology or ontology

system.description: URI identifying the coding system (e.g., http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/stato)

code.description: The code value within the system (e.g., STATO_0000179)

Coding.title: Coding

Cardinality.description: How many variables can fill an input role
Cardinality.title: Cardinality

Configuration.description: A configurable parameter for a method

dataType.description: Data type of the configuration value

defaultValue.description: Default value if not specified (can be string, number, or boolean)

enumValues.description: Allowed values when dataType is enum

Configuration.title: Configuration

DataType.description: FHIR primitive data types for method inputs and outputs
DataType.title: DataType

FormulaNotation.description: The notation system used for formulas
FormulaNotation.title: FormulaNotation

FormulaSpec.description: Specifies the formula notation and expressions for a method

default_expression.description: Concrete example expression with default variable names

generic_expression.description: Template expression with role-tagged placeholders, e.g., <response> ~ <covariate>

FormulaSpec.title: FormulaSpec

InputBinding.description: A concrete binding of a concept to a method role within a transformation template. Aligned with W3C Data Cube RoleBinding semantics: each binding declares direction (input/output) and dataStructureRole (measure/dimension/attribute). Named slices at the transformation level replace per-binding dimensionConstraints.

concept.description: The bound concept (e.g., C.Measure, C.Change, Treatment)

methodRole.description: The method role this binding fills (e.g., response, covariate, fixed_effect, minuend, difference)

direction.description: Whether this binding is an input to or output from the transformation

dataStructureRole.description: W3C Data Cube role: measure (observed/computed value), dimension (identifies/locates observation), or attribute (metadata)

slice.description: Reference to a named slice defined in the transformation's namedSlices. Replaces inline dimensionConstraints.

requiredValueType.description: FHIR value type constraint (e.g., Quantity, CodeableConcept, Identifier)

description.description: Human-readable description of what this binding represents

note.description: Additional context or clarification for this binding

InputBinding.title: InputBinding

InputRole.description: Specification of one input to a method

cardinality.description: How many variables can fill this role

name.description: Role name used in the formula, e.g., response, covariate, partition

statisticalRole.description: The statistical role of this input in the model

InputRole.title: InputRole

Method.description: A reusable statistical or derivation method definition. Distinguished by type (analysis vs derivation) and formula notation.

assumptions.description: Key assumptions required for the method to be valid

class.description: Method category, e.g., General Linear Models, Arithmetic, Data Handling

description.description: Free-text explanation of what the method does

formula.description: Formula specification including notation and expressions

input_roles.description: Input data specifications with statistical roles

intent.description: Semantic purpose tags for the method

oid.description: Unique method identifier, e.g., M.ANCOVA, M.Subtraction

schema_version.description: Version of the ACDC method schema this definition conforms to

codings.description: Mappings to external terminology or ontology codes

stato_r_implementation.description: DEPRECATED (v0.7.0): Use method_implementation_catalog instead. R command or function reference from STATO ontology.

type.description: Whether this is an analysis or derivation method

Method.title: Method

MethodType.description: Whether a method is an analysis or derivation
MethodType.title: MethodType

OutputClass.description: One class of output from a method. References output_class_templates by the class field and statistics_vocabulary by the statistics field.

cardinality.description: DEPRECATED (v0.6.0): How many rows this output class produces. Use dimensions + class for machine resolution instead.

class.description: Name of the output class template, e.g., fit_statistics, computed_value

dimensions.description: Dimensions (role names from input_roles) that index the output rows — defines the structural axes of this output class

sub_types.description: Optional sub-type variants of this output class

template_ref.description: Explicit reference to output class template (alternative to class)

OutputClass.title: OutputClass

OutputClassSubType.description: A sub-type variant of an output class (e.g., contrasts at different levels)
OutputClassSubType.title: OutputClassSubType

cardinality.description: How many output rows this class produces

dimensions.description: Dimensions that index the output rows

statistics.description: Statistic names from the vocabulary that this template includes

OutputSpecification.description: Container for the output classes a method produces
OutputSpecification.title: OutputSpecification

Statistic.description: A reusable statistic/measure definition in the vocabulary

dataType.description: Data type of the statistic value

name.description: Statistic identifier, e.g., estimate, p_value, F_statistic

codings.description: Mappings to external terminology or ontology codes

Statistic.title: Statistic

StatisticalRole.description: The statistical role of an input variable
StatisticalRole.title: StatisticalRole

description: A reusable statistical or derivation method definition. Distinguished by type (analysis vs derivation) and formula notation.

assumptions.description: Key assumptions required for the method to be valid

class.description: Method category, e.g., General Linear Models, Arithmetic, Data Handling

description.description: Free-text explanation of what the method does

formula.description: Formula specification including notation and expressions

input_roles.description: Input data specifications with statistical roles

intent.description: Semantic purpose tags for the method

oid.description: Unique method identifier, e.g., M.ANCOVA, M.Subtraction

schema_version.description: Version of the ACDC method schema this definition conforms to

codings.description: Mappings to external terminology or ontology codes

stato_r_implementation.description: DEPRECATED (v0.7.0): Use method_implementation_catalog instead. R command or function reference from STATO ontology.

type.description: Whether this is an analysis or derivation method

title: acdc_methods
